case_title: JOHN SCOTT MARTIN VS. SAN FRANCISCO CABINETS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTIN, JOHN SCOTT AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO CABINETS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTIN, JOHN SCOTT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO CABINETS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $12,208.03 PRINCIPAL, $58.90 INTEREST, $303.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,570.43, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
